Hello, I'm

Akarsha Naik

Senior UX Designer Whimsy Chaser 5+ Yrs in UX 29+ Yrs of Experience

I turn complex B2B travel workflows into intuitive, usable experiences. With 5+ Years of Experience and currently a Senior UX Designer at MakeMyTrip, I focus on building products that are as functional as they are easy to use.

Curiosity generally leads my way, with a constant urge to learn, explore and create. I live life with a slightly unreasonable amount of optimism and a quest to find joy in the small, everyday moments.

Hey, there's a whole another side to this folio

Funsies with AI ✦

A relationship that had begun with overwhelm and fear is slowly turning into friendship. I am having too much fun experimenting these days.

Vibe-Coding Exploration 1

Bird Sketcher
& Identifier

Birds are so swift that sometimes you're left enchanted — but with no idea which one it was. This tool lets you draw or describe the bird from memory and helps you find exactly what you spotted.
Vibe-Coding Exploration 2

Starcatcher

When the clouds are too thick and everything seems dark, just catch a shooting star and listen closely to the message the universe wants to give you today.

About Me

I'm a Senior UX Designer with 5+ Years of Experience designing B2B travel products at MakeMyTrip. I specialise in turning complex, multi-step workflows into intuitive experiences that real people actually enjoy.

My process is rooted in research, systemic thinking, empathising with the user needs and goals, and the beliefs that

  • Good designs should seem as natural as having a conversation
  • A little fun never hurt anyone
